ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the region */,
  "housing_median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of housing units in the region */,
  "total_housing_units" INTEGER /* Total number of housing units in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the region's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the data was collected */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., housing, population, income) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the dataset */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dataset is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the housing data belongs to */,
  "housing_median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the housing units */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the housing units */,
  "total_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of bedrooms in the housing units */,
  "median_room_size" REAL /* Median size of rooms in square feet */,
  "median_bedroom_size" REAL /* Median size of bedrooms in square feet */,
  "median_home_size" REAL /* Median size of homes in square feet */,
  "median_housing_value" INTEGER /* Median value of housing units */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the housing data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the population data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Total number of households */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of gender */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of age groups */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicities */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the income data belongs to */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of income levels */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the income data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ocean_proximity" (
  "ocean_proximity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ocean proximity data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the ocean proximity data belongs to */,
  "ocean_proximity" TEXT /* Ocean proximity category (e.g., NEAR BAY, INLAND) */,
  "distance_to_ocean" REAL /* Distance to the nearest ocean in kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the ocean proximity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ocean_proximity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ocean_proximity_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "house_value_data" (
  "house_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each house value data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the house value data belongs to */,
  "median_house_value" INTEGER /* Median house value */,
  "median_home_size" REAL /* Median size of homes in square feet */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the house value data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("house_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_house_value_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
